backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profiles, user accounts, balance management, and transaction history with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (sticky header, hero slider, game grid, live sidebar, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of key frontend files (Footer, AuthModal, Wallet, App, Profile), noting specific bug fixes applied to each.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the ASIF969 Gaming Site that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for home, wallet, promo, admin, and profile pages, wrapping everything in AuthProvider, SidebarProvider, and a shared Layout with global UI elements.
frontend/src/components/AuthModal.tsx: Authentication modal supporting login and registration flows with a multi-step process (form → OTP verification → success), using mock async logic to simulate backend calls and set a mock user on success.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Mobile-only fixed bottom navigation bar with four links (Home, Wallet, Promo, Profile) that highlights the active route using gold accent styling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with trust badges, brand info, quick links, legal links, and social icons. Includes a responsible gaming section and dynamic copyright year.
frontend/src/components/GameCard.tsx: Displays a single game card with thumbnail, HOT/NEW badges, hover overlay with a Play Now button, and game title/provider info.
frontend/src/components/GameGrid.tsx: Renders a filterable grid of 16 hardcoded games grouped by category tabs (All, Slots, Live Casino, Sports, Table Games) using GameCard components.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with logo, desktop nav links, a winners marquee ticker, and auth-aware right section showing balance, notifications, and a profile dropdown.
frontend/src/components/HeroSlider.tsx: Auto-advancing image slider with three promotional slides, featuring headline text, CTA buttons, prev/next arrows, and dot indicators with a 4-second interval.
frontend/src/components/LeftSidebar.tsx: Collapsible left navigation sidebar with category links, mobile drawer support with overlay, and trust badge display at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/LiveSidebar.tsx: A collapsible right sidebar component that displays a live feed of randomly generated recent wins (updating every 3.5 seconds) and a static leaderboard, with tabs to switch between the two views.
frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx: React context providing mock authentication state including user info, balance updates, login/logout, and auth modal open/close controls.
frontend/src/context/SidebarContext.tsx: React context managing left sidebar open/collapsed state and the active game category selection.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider that wraps DFINITY's AuthClient to manage Internet Identity login, logout, and identity persistence, exposing login status and identity via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for user profile, user creation, transactions, and admin checks, with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind and custom fonts, defining CSS variables for theming and utility classes for gold/neon-blue colors, glow effects, game card styles, marquee animation, and sidebar/nav active states.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin dashboard page with three tabs (User Management, Bet Tracking, Withdrawals) using mock data, allowing admins to view users/bets and approve or reject withdrawal requests.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page displaying a hero slider, stats bar, game grid, and a toggleable live sidebar with a mobile floating button to open the live feed.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: User profile page showing account info, balance, and navigation menu items; displays a login/register prompt if the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/Promotions.tsx: Promotions page rendering a grid of six bonus/promo cards with images, descriptions, and a claim button that triggers a toast notification on click.
frontend/src/pages/Wallet.tsx: Wallet page supporting deposit and withdrawal flows with quick-amount buttons, payment method selection, balance updates via AuthContext, and a transaction history list.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL query parameters (including from hash-based routes), persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the gaming site, extending the theme with custom colors (gold, neon-blue, charcoal), fonts (Rajdhani, Inter), shadows, keyframe animations (marquee, pulse-glow, accordion), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor (version 3) for a mobile-first dark-themed gaming/casino website (CK444/ASIF969 style) built with React and Tailwind, documenting existing features, architectural notes, required images, and known issues.
